category_sources: source_facts.description says rp finds ROP sequences in PE, ELF, and Mach-O binaries.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives rp; the official repository README names the tool rp++ or rp.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/0vercl0k/rp, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ROP sequence discovery in executable binary formats; current_curation.tags includes cli.
